headings.text: More than 70 airlines operate out of JFK

sections.heading: More than 70 airlines operate out of JFK
sections.textPreview: More than 70 airlines operate out of JFKBelow is a list of operating airlines and which terminal they operate out of, as well as their contact information. This information is based on the most up to date details available, but please check with your airline before you travel, as
Terminal 5 (Int'l Arrivals, 5:00 a.m. to 10:30 p.m.) Terminal 4 (Int'l Arrivals, 10:30 p.m. to 5:00 a.m.)
The AirTrain connects passengers to terminals, airport parking lots, the hotel shuttle area, the rental car center, and public transportation.
